# Vendor Evaluation

| **Expected Capability** | **Priority** | **Leegality** | **Digio** | **In-house** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Customer signing using hand-drawn signature | High | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| Customer signing using OTP shouldn’t have additional OTP | High |  |  | Yes |
| Customer signing using OTP shouldn’t have additional OTP | High |  |  | Yes |
| Possibility to reduce vendor name | High | To check |  | Yes |
| Possibility to increase CTA size | Medium |  |  | Yes |
| Ability to build custom color schemes |  |  |  | Yes |
| Commercial for customer signing |  |  |  | Yes |
| Commercials for counter-signing |  |  |  | Yes |
| Effort of building agreement page |  |  |  | Yes |
| Commercials for stamp procurement |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |
